records.ety: [L. describere, descriptum; de- + scribere to write: cf. OE. descriven, OF. descrivre, F. dcrire. See Scribe, and cf. Descry.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Described (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Describing.]

defs: To represent by drawing; to draw a plan of; to delineate; to trace or mark out; as, to describe a circle by the compasses; a torch waved about the head in such a way as to describe a circle.
To represent by words written or spoken; to give an account of; to make known to others by words or signs; as, the geographer describes countries and cities.
To distribute into parts, groups, or classes; to mark off; to class.
quotes: Passed through the land, and described it by cities into seven parts in a book.

defs: To use the faculty of describing; to give a description; as, Milton describes with uncommon force and beauty.
